windows.summary_v2: A wide three-wick container candle in a decorative glass holder is shown burning, revealing a tunneled, uneven melt pool around the wicks.

seconds_v2.desc: Side view of a wide three-wick pillar candle burning inside a clear glass holder wrapped in a silver snowflake-cutout sleeve; three flames flicker above a smooth pale wax surface.
Same angled side view of the lit three-wick candle in the snowflake-ringed glass holder; pale wax pool around the three flames remains shallow with little melt depth.
Continued side view of the three burning wicks; the wax stays mostly solid except for a small melt pool around each flame, showing early tunneling on the cream candle.
Side angle of the three-wick glass candle; tiny pool of liquid wax around each wick while the rest of the surface remains hard and uneven.
Same side view, three flames steady on top of a shallow uneven wax surface inside the snowflake-decorated glass vessel.
Cut to top-down view of the same three-wick candle: the surface is mostly solid pale wax with a small darker melt pool around each wick, demonstrating tunneling.
Top-down view of the lit three-wick candle; three small flames sit in narrow melt pockets surrounded by unmelted hard wax along the glass walls.
Continued overhead shot of the same candle; uneven crater-like surface around the wicks confirms the wax is not melting edge-to-edge.
Final top-down frame of the three-wick candle still burning with three small flames in narrow melt pools, showing the tunneled burn pattern.
